description: Eval corpus for cami-design. Each case tests whether the skill catches a specific principle or anti-pattern. Run with: npm run eval

evals.input: Review this loading message: "Herding pixels and making magic happen..."

evals.description: Flags passive voice in error message
evals.input: Review this error message: "Your file could not be uploaded due to an error."

evals.description: Flags missing hover state on interactive element
Flags inconsistent spacing in a component
Flags alpha color as design smell
Flags disabled attribute instead of aria-disabled
evals.input:
Review this submit button:

```tsx
<button
  disabled={!isFormValid}
  onClick={handleSubmit}
  className="btn-primary"
>
  Save changes
</button>
```

evals.description: Flags confirmation dialog that says 'Are you sure?'
evals.input:
Review this confirmation dialog:

Title: "Are you sure?"
Body: "This action cannot be undone."
Buttons: "Cancel" / "OK"

evals.description: Flags boolean prop sprawl on a component
evals.input:
Review this component usage:

```tsx
<Tabs isVertical isLazy isFitted hasDivider isSticky>
  <Tab label="Overview" />
  <Tab label="Details" />
</Tabs>
```

evals.description: Flags array index used as React key
Flags div onClick instead of button
evals.input:
Review this interactive element: ```tsx
```

evals.description: Flags missing cleanup in useEffect fetch (state & data flow)
Flags `as any` hiding a type error (typing)
Flags arbitrary Tailwind value where a DS token exists (DS fidelity)
evals.input:
Review this component:

```tsx
<button className="bg-[#3b82f6] text-[14px] gap-[13px] px-[18px]">
  Continue
</button>
```

The project's tokens.css defines: `--color-primary-500: oklch(...);`, `--text-body-13`, `--space-3` (12px), `--space-4` (16px).
